title: Call: If a company issues a call option with a strike...
summary: Determine whether a call option is out-of-the-money when strike exceeds market price.
prompt: If a company issues a call option with a strike price above the current market price, the option is considered:

options.text: A call option is out-of-the-money if the strike price is above the current

solution: A call option is out-of-the-money if the strike price is above the current market price, meaning it would not be exercised. [[24]]
